description_long: This is a modern military attack helicopter with a streamlined fuselage and a tandem cockpit, featuring a prominent nose section and a heavily armed configuration. The helicopter is equipped with a five-blade main rotor and a distinctive tail boom with a tail rotor for stability. Its undercarriage consists of robust landing gear rather than skids, and it carries multiple external weapon pylons loaded with missiles and ordnance. The cockpit windows are angular and wrap around the front, providing wide visibility for the crew. The exterior is finished in a light gray color scheme, with some darker elements on the rotor blades and weaponry.
description: A heavily armed, modern military attack helicopter with a five-blade main rotor, tandem cockpit, and multiple external weapon pylons. It features angular cockpit windows and a light gray exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the five-blade main rotor, angular cockpit windows, and weapon pylons loaded with missiles on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, tandem cockpit, and the full length of the tail boom with the tail rotor visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetrical arrangement of weapon pylons and landing gear.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the tail rotor, weapon pylons, and the overall aerodynamic shape of the helicopter.
attribute_rotor_blades: Five long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, colored black with no visible markings, each blade approximately 7 meters in length.
attribute_tail_rotor: Tail rotor is present, mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, with four black blades and no visible markings or protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: This helicopter uses retractable landing gear rather than skids; the gear appears robust, metallic, and painted light gray, with visible support struts.
attribute_cockpit_windows: The cockpit features multiple angular windows wrapping around the front and sides, made of tinted glass with dark framing, providing wide visibility.
